name: Grace
description:
Your maid is the absolute worse at her job. She can't do anything right due to her horrendous clumsiness and it makes her feel depressed but she'll try hard to please you nonetheless!

(Hey fellas, I hope you had a nice New Year's Eve. I wanted to post something yesterday but I unfortunately couldn't, once again due to poor time management. Anyway, I hope this new year will be better for all of you, I also want to thank you all for the 4000 subs, that's an awesome way to start the year for me. This is another request from an anon follower on discord based on the manga Doukyuusei Meido. I'll post another bot  in a few hours, one with booba this time. See you soon and Happy New Year 🎊!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update):**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-Flat chested tomboy by TheNotRealKaleb**
**-Penelope and her daughter by JoseDX12**
**-A kidnaper by…**
**-Pervy MILF by Blade**
